commands.label: page refresh dry-run closeout
commands.command: AIPEDIA_GOAL_ID=2026-06-30-agentic-tooling-meta-os AIPEDIA_RUN_ID=2026-06-30-slice-22-page-refresh-policy-blocker AIPEDIA_RESIDUAL_RISKS="Dry-run page-refresh closeout proves policy shape and stale-input blocking, not rendered page quality." AIPEDIA_NEXT_ACTIONS="Regenerate PAGE_REFRESH_LEDGER.md only when separate Synthesia content WIP is ready to be integrated." npm run runner:page-refresh:closeout -- --plan local/tmp/aipedia-runner/page-refresh/page-refresh-batch.json --report-dir local/tmp/aipedia-runner/page-refresh/reports --receipt-dir local/tmp/aipedia-runner/page-refresh/receipts-slice-22 --skip-build --skip-route-qa --skip-source-health --dry-run

input_freshness.next_action: Run npm run ledger:pages && npm run ledger:pages:check, then rerun page refresh planning with --fail-on-stale-ledger.

system_progress.note: Expected for a dry-run proof created before Slice 22 system edits were staged.

issues.detail: page-refresh passed receipts require fresh input_freshness.

residual_risks: This is a negative policy proof. It proves runner-produced page-refresh receipts fail closed when input freshness is stale, not that a page-refresh closeout can pass on live content.
The live page-refresh ledger remains stale because separate Synthesia content WIP has not been integrated and should not be touched by this system slice.
Build, source-health, and route QA were intentionally skipped in dry-run mode, so this does not validate rendered page quality.
next_actions: After the separate Synthesia content WIP is resolved, regenerate PAGE_REFRESH_LEDGER.md and run a positive bounded page-refresh policy proof.
Keep the page-refresh workflow policy stale-input regression test in the closeout validator.
